methodology: Public pricing scraped live from vendor /pricing pages (Zapier, Make, n8n, Respond.io, Wati, AiSensy, Bardeen, Tray.ai, Voltade, Sleek). Big 4 / SI / boutique consultancy pricing estimated from Singapore RFP benchmarks (Kthology, lotique, OTG Lab public blog ranges: SGD 8K–15K entry / 50K–250K+ enterprise); retained engagements modelled at SGD 5K–20K/mo. In-house AI engineer modelled from Morgan McKinley + Glassdoor SG 2026 (SGD 7K–12K base + 17% CPF employer + benefits). PSG-eligibility verified against IMDA GoBusiness pre-approved list where flagged. FX: S$1 = ~US$0.74. All SGD figures are monthly unless noted. Every non-public number has pricing_flag = 'hidden_estimated'.

categories.global_workflow: Global AI workflow / iPaaS platforms with SG customer base
categories.sg_local_ai: Singapore-local AI workflow startups and automation consultancies
categories.big_si: Big 4 / large SIs' digital transformation and AI arms
categories.regional_sea: Regional SEA AI / automation vendors active in SG
categories.consumer_rewrap: Vendors repackaging ChatGPT/Claude APIs as 'AI assistants'
categories.whatsapp_ai: WhatsApp Business API-native AI / chatbot vendors
categories.accounting_ai: AI accounting / bookkeeping integrations for SG small business
categories.inhouse_build: Hiring a 1-person AI engineer in-house (real substitute)
categories.psg_vendor: IMDA PSG pre-approved productivity solution vendors
categories.diy_alt: DIY alternatives (ChatGPT + GSuite, no formal tooling)

competitors.name: Zapier
competitors.target_market: Global SMBs + operations teams wanting to self-serve multi-app automations; SG users skew toward marketing/ops at funded startups
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Free / US$19.99 Pro / US$69 Team / US$69+ Enterprise (≈ S$27–93+/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: 7,000+ app connectors and a self-serve builder that lets any ops person wire Zaps together in minutes
strengths: Massive app catalog (7,000+) and brand trust
True self-serve — credit card signup, no sales call
Copilot + AI Agents/Chatbot tiers keep it relevant for GenAI workflows
weaknesses: Build-your-own — SG SMEs without an ops person stall after 2 Zaps
No PSG grant eligibility and zero SG-localised content (no PayNow, GST, IRAS, MOM)
Task-based billing explodes at scale; surprise bills a common SG complaint

competitors.name: Make (Make.com)
competitors.target_market: Technical ops / agencies / power users who find Zapier too expensive per-task and want visual scenario builder
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Free / US$9 Core / US$16 Pro / US$29 Teams (≈ S$12–39/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Cheaper per-operation than Zapier with a visual scenario canvas, popular among automation consultants
strengths: Cheapest credible global iPaaS — 10,000 credits at US$9
Visual canvas well-suited to multi-branch logic
Popular reseller / consultant community in SEA (incl. KL, Jakarta)
weaknesses: No SG localisation, no PSG, no WhatsApp Business API native
Steeper learning curve than Zapier — SG SMEs need a consultant anyway
Credit model still opaque for owners who aren't technical

competitors.name: n8n Cloud
competitors.target_market: Developer-leaning teams that want open-source workflow automation with AI agent nodes; self-host option attracts PDPA-conscious SG buyers
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: €20 Starter / €50 Pro / €667 Business / Enterprise custom (≈ S$29–973/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Open-source workflow automation with native LLM nodes and self-hosting for data-sovereignty-sensitive buyers
strengths: Self-hosted option addresses PDPA / IRAS data-residency concerns
Strong AI agent nodes (OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain)
Fast-growing developer community; free self-host plan
weaknesses: Needs a developer to run — no SG SME owner is self-hosting
Zero SG localisation and not PSG-eligible
Cloud Pro execution limits bite before most real workflows ship

competitors.name: Workato
competitors.target_market: SG enterprise 500+ employees needing governed iPaaS; NOT SME — listed because buyers sometimes confuse with SME tooling
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Contact for quote (typical SG enterprise band S$4K–20K+/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Enterprise-grade iPaaS with recipes, AI agents (Workato Genie) and deep SaaS integration library
strengths: Strong in SG enterprise (DBS, GovTech-adjacent clients)
Governance, SOC2, data loss prevention baked in
Sales-led motion with local SG presence
weaknesses: Entirely wrong price point for SMEs under 200 employees
6–12 week implementation not 48 hours
Not PSG-eligible; aimed at EDG / enterprise spend

competitors.name: Tray.ai
competitors.target_market: Mid-market / enterprise GTM and RevOps teams; agentic workflow automation for 200+ employee companies
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Pro ~US$595/mo (some tiers list US$99–599); Team / Enterprise custom (≈ S$130–4K+/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Agentic iPaaS with Merlin AI agents; strong for RevOps at scale
strengths: Agent + workflow hybrid is on-trend for 2026
weaknesses: No self-serve — sales-led from the first click
Zero SG SME localisation and not PSG-eligible
Minimum commits exclude most SG SMEs

competitors.name: Bardeen
competitors.target_market: Individual SDRs / ops / growth marketers wanting browser-native AI scraping and enrichment
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Free / US$10 Basic / US$50 Premium / Enterprise custom (≈ S$14–68/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Browser-native AI scraper/enricher + prebuilt 'playbooks' — good lead-gen workflow substitute at personal price point
strengths: Prebuilt playbooks (LinkedIn -> sheet -> email) rival XinceAI's lead-gen workflow at 1/10 price
Growth among SG SDRs and solo founders
weaknesses: Individual-first, not team/workflow-first — breaks at multi-user SG SME
Chrome-only, data never touches SG servers
No PSG, no SG accounting/WhatsApp integrations

competitors.name: Voltade (Envoy AI CRM)
competitors.target_market: Singapore SMEs 5–50 headcount wanting CRM + WhatsApp + AI chatbot + grant hand-holding in one PSG-subsidised bundle
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: S$99/mo (S$50/mo effective after 50% PSG); annual S$2K+ equivalent
competitors.primary_value_prop: 'The only AI CRM built for Singapore SMEs' — PSG pre-approved, WhatsApp native, grant handled for you
strengths: Direct overlap with XinceAI positioning — PSG pre-approved + SG-localised + WhatsApp
Effective S$50/mo after PSG is hard to beat on raw price
weaknesses: CRM-centric — not 9 pre-built workflows across lead/support/docs/sales
Less founder-led; more product-led with sales team
Still fairly new — brand trust thinner than incumbents

competitors.name: Kthology
competitors.target_market: Singapore SMEs wanting a custom AI MVP (bookings, order intake, support deflection) shipped in 2 weeks with grant support
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Project S$8K–15K build + retainer (≈ S$1K–2.5K/mo estimated)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Boutique SG AI consultancy — 2-week MVP with PSG / 100E / A*STAR grant navigation baked in
strengths: Local SG presence with grant expertise
weaknesses: Custom = more expensive than XinceAI's S$500/mo entry
2-week build vs XinceAI's 48-hour deploy
Project-based; retainer economics less predictable than SaaS

competitors.name: 41 Labs
competitors.target_market: SG accounting firms and professional services firms with document-heavy workflows wanting custom AI without fixed upfront cost
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: '$0 until you see clear value' — retainer S$2K–5K/mo estimated once live
competitors.primary_value_prop: Custom AI systems for SG professional services — free 30-min strategy call + free working prototype, pay only if it works
strengths: Risk-free prototype removes buyer friction — directly attacks XinceAI's 30-min diagnostic
Strong content marketing; ranks on SG AI searches
weaknesses: Custom build cycle slower than pre-built 48-hour XinceAI workflows
Once live, retainer price 5–10x XinceAI
Doesn't scale beyond hands-on founding team

competitors.name: DoubleAM
competitors.target_market: Singapore SMBs wanting an AI automation agency to build custom workflows (lead gen, follow-up, content)
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Project S$5K–20K + monthly retainer (≈ S$1.5K–3K/mo estimated)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Full-service AI automation agency in Singapore — done-for-you builds on n8n/Make/Zapier stack
strengths: Agency model familiar to SME owners
weaknesses: Resells global tools underneath — no proprietary IP
Retainer inflates compared to XinceAI's S$500/mo cap
No pre-built workflow library — rebuilds for each client

competitors.name: Lotique
competitors.target_market: Singapore SMEs evaluating AI automation and searching for SG-specific rollout guidance
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Project S$8K–15K (entry) to S$50K+ (enterprise); retainers estimated S$1.5K–3K/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: SG AI automation studio with public cost/use-case/rollout guides — content-led lead generation
strengths: Strong SEO on 'AI automation Singapore' keywords
weaknesses: Still custom-build economics — not 48-hour deploy
Small team caps delivery capacity
Overlapping pitch with XinceAI but higher price

competitors.name: NCS (AI & Digital Services)
competitors.target_market: SG large enterprise + public sector — banks, GLCs, statutory boards running 6–12 month AI transformation programmes
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Contact for quote — typical programme S$150K–2M+; retained AI advisory ~S$10K–30K/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: Singtel-owned SG SI with S$130M AI programme, NVIDIA/Google/AWS alliances and public-sector credibility
strengths: Unmatched enterprise + govt trust in SG
Deep bench (13,000+ staff) and domain depth
Agentic AI solutions w/ NVIDIA partnership
weaknesses: Completely mispriced for SG SMEs under 200 employees
6–12 month delivery, not 48 hours
No PSG focus — plays EDG / enterprise transformation strand

competitors.name: Accenture Singapore
competitors.target_market: SG enterprise 1000+ employees, especially banks / telcos / govt — AI reinvention programmes
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Contact for quote — minimum engagement typically S$200K; retainer S$15K–50K+/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: Global Tier-1 SI with OpenAI + NVIDIA alliances, outcome-based pricing for enterprise AI
weaknesses: SME-irrelevant — 10–50x XinceAI price
Months to deploy, not days
No PSG eligibility; plays on enterprise budgets

competitors.name: Deloitte Digital Singapore
competitors.target_market: SG enterprise + mid-market banking, insurance, public-sector AI and ERP transformations
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Contact for quote — programme S$150K–1M+; retainer S$12K–40K/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: Big 4 brand with digital delivery arm — AI strategy + implementation + audit comfort
weaknesses: Not built for SG SME budgets
Slow deployment and senior-light staffing on smaller engagements
PSG not in their commercial model

competitors.name: KPMG Lighthouse Singapore
competitors.target_market: SG mid-market + enterprise — data & AI transformation with governance/risk lens
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Contact for quote — programme S$100K–600K; retainer S$8K–25K/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: Big 4 data & AI arm — governance-first AI delivery
strengths: Governance + model risk strong fit for FIs
SG audit relationships pull through advisory
weaknesses: Wrong price point for SMEs
Advisory-heavy; lighter on hands-on build
Not PSG-eligible

competitors.name: Glints TalentHub
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs and SEA expanders wanting recruitment + EOR + HR tech with AI-matched talent
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Custom quote — EOR/payroll per-head bundles; typical SG SME spend S$800–2K/mo+ equivalent
competitors.primary_value_prop: SEA-native recruitment + EOR platform using AI for candidate matching — adjacent category that SMEs sometimes buy instead of automating HR
strengths: Strong employer brand in SG tech hiring
weaknesses: Not a workflow-automation product — adjacent category
Per-head pricing, not SaaS-simple
No broader ops/finance/marketing workflows

competitors.name: Lyzr / Antler AI portfolio startups
competitors.target_market: SG + SEA startups building agentic AI products; targets technical founders/CTOs
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Free dev tier; paid from ~US$99/mo; enterprise custom (≈ S$135+/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Agent framework + managed platform (representative of the Antler-class AI startups currently pitching SG SMEs)
weaknesses: Dev-tool first, SME last — wrong buyer
No SG workflow localisation
Frequent pivots / runway risk

competitors.name: 'AI assistant' rewrappers (Vietnam/Malaysia/India sellers)
competitors.target_market: Cost-sensitive SG micro-businesses lured by cheap '24/7 AI assistant on WhatsApp/web' pitches on LinkedIn + Facebook
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: S$29–149/mo bundles (ChatGPT/Claude API wrapped under brand)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Cheap WhatsApp/website 'AI assistant' — essentially an OpenAI API key + Dialogflow/Voiceflow skin
strengths: Lowest possible price point in market
weaknesses: No SG localisation, no PDPA/IRAS posture, no PSG
Support timezone/language mismatch
Churn/quality issues — gives 'AI' a bad name; XinceAI looks premium in comparison

competitors.name: Respond.io
competitors.target_market: SG/SEA SMB and mid-market sales and support teams using WhatsApp + multi-channel messaging
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: US$79 Starter / US$159 Growth / US$279 Advanced / Enterprise custom (≈ S$107–377/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Multi-channel messaging + AI Agent + workflow automation with strong WhatsApp BSP footprint in SG
weaknesses: No pre-built cross-workflow library beyond messaging
Not PSG-eligible on its own (bundled by partners)
No Xero/PayNow/IRAS native

competitors.name: Wati.io
competitors.target_market: SMB WhatsApp-first businesses across SEA running broadcasts, chatbots, and sales automation
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: US$29 Growth / US$99 Pro / Business custom (≈ S$39–135+/mo) + per-message costs
competitors.primary_value_prop: Affordable WhatsApp Business API inbox + no-code chatbot + AI replies — popular SG SME entry point
strengths: Cheapest credible WhatsApp API + bot tier
weaknesses: Messaging-only — no accounting/lead/ops workflows
No SG-native integrations (PayNow/Xero SG/IRAS)
Not PSG-pre-approved directly

competitors.name: AiSensy
competitors.target_market: Indian + SEA SMEs wanting cheap WhatsApp broadcast + bot at INR pricing; price-leader for SG micro-businesses
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Free / ₹1,500 Basic / ₹3,200 Pro (≈ S$24–52/mo) + per-message costs
competitors.primary_value_prop: Rupee-pricing WhatsApp BSP with AI replies — cheapest credible WhatsApp automation in the market
weaknesses: No SG localisation, no PSG eligibility
Support quality variable; India timezone
Pure messaging — no lead / doc / accounting workflows

competitors.name: Twilio / Segment SG implementations
competitors.target_market: SG scale-ups and enterprises building proprietary customer messaging / CDP pipelines with engineering teams
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Pay-as-you-go + enterprise commits; Segment from US$120/mo; total SG build S$1K–10K+/mo
competitors.primary_value_prop: Programmable messaging + CDP — power tool for teams with engineers
strengths: Most flexible stack for complex needs
weaknesses: Developer-required — irrelevant to non-technical SG SMEs
Cost compounds unpredictably
Not PSG-eligible; not pre-built

competitors.name: Dext (formerly Receipt Bank)
competitors.target_market: SG accountants and bookkeeping-heavy SMEs automating invoice/receipt capture into Xero
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Per-client plans from ~US$25–45/mo (≈ S$34–60/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Category-leading receipt/invoice OCR into Xero/QBO — de facto standard at SG accounting firms
weaknesses: Accounting-only — doesn't cover lead gen/support/sales workflows
Sold through accountants, not direct to SME
Not PSG-eligible standalone

competitors.name: Hubdoc (Xero)
competitors.target_market: Xero subscribers in SG — auto-included in Xero Starter+ plans
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Included with Xero Starter and above (Xero SG from S$20/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Auto-fetch + OCR for bills/statements, bundled free with Xero — zero-friction accounting automation
strengths: Free to Xero users — effectively zero-cost
weaknesses: Accounting-only — doesn't touch marketing/sales/support
Limited AI beyond OCR
Sells a category, not a workflow suite

competitors.name: Syft Analytics (Xero)
competitors.target_market: SG accountants and FP&A-lean SMEs wanting AI-driven reports, forecasts and consolidation on Xero/QBO
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: From ~US$30–89/mo standalone; bundled in higher Xero tiers (≈ S$40–120/mo)
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI-powered financial reporting and forecasting layered on Xero — extends Xero into insights/advisory
weaknesses: Finance reporting only
Not workflow automation
Not PSG-eligible standalone

competitors.name: Peakflo
competitors.target_market: SG + SEA mid-market SMEs wanting AI-driven AP/AR automation with PSG pre-approval
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Contact for quote — typical AP automation S$20K–30K Y1 (≈ S$1.5K–2.5K/mo); net S$800–1.2K/mo after 50% PSG
competitors.primary_value_prop: PSG pre-approved AI finance automation (AP/AR/procure-to-pay) with SG-localised flows and bank formats
weaknesses: Finance-only — no lead gen/support/sales workflows
Priced above XinceAI's sub-S$500/mo cap before PSG
Sales-led — no 48-hour self-serve

competitors.name: In-house AI engineer hire
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs and funded startups choosing to hire vs. buy — often the real budget competitor at decision time
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Base S$7K–12K/mo + CPF/benefits (~17%) + tooling; fully loaded S$9K–15K/mo (S$108K–180K/yr)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Own your AI — hire a mid-level engineer to build whatever you need, on your roadmap
weaknesses: 20x+ the monthly cost of XinceAI
3–6 months to hire + onboard + ship anything
Single-point-of-failure; retention risk in hot AI market

competitors.name: JustLogin (PSG HR + AI features)
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs 5–200 staff digitalising HR/payroll with AI receipts + performance insights under PSG subsidy
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Per-user bundles; typical S$100–300/mo pre-PSG; 50% PSG funding available
competitors.primary_value_prop: PSG pre-approved HR + payroll + expense suite with AI-powered receipt scan and analytics
weaknesses: HR/payroll only — not cross-workflow automation
Limited AI depth vs. dedicated AI tools
Replacement, not layer — competes for SME digital budget

competitors.name: QuickHR
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting PSG-subsidised HR/payroll with AI assist; 3,200+ SG customers
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Per-user plans ~S$100–250/mo pre-PSG; 50% PSG funding available
competitors.primary_value_prop: IMDA pre-approved HR SaaS — 'digitalise smarter at half the cost' with PSG
weaknesses: HR-only — adjacent, not overlapping with XinceAI workflows
Limited AI beyond HR heuristics
Competes for PSG budget share

competitors.name: OTG Lab (Generative AI Customer Engagement)
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs wanting PSG-subsidised AI chatbot + customer engagement on web/WhatsApp/Messenger
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: Project S$8K–20K + retainer; typical net S$200–400/mo after 50% PSG
competitors.primary_value_prop: PSG pre-approved GenAI customer engagement bundle — chatbot across web/WA/Messenger
weaknesses: Customer engagement only — not full workflow suite
Agency-style delivery; less productised than XinceAI's 9 workflows
Deployment multi-week

competitors.name: DIY: ChatGPT Plus + Google Workspace
competitors.target_market: SG SME owner / ops lead hand-prompting ChatGPT into docs/sheets/inboxes — the silent majority status quo
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: ChatGPT Plus US$20/mo + Workspace Business Standard US$14/user/mo (≈ S$45/mo for a solo user)
competitors.primary_value_prop: Zero-integration AI: copy/paste ChatGPT output into email, Sheets, WhatsApp — already good enough for many owners
strengths: Owner already logged in — no change management
weaknesses: Not a workflow — depends on the owner to keep doing it daily
No systems of record, no audit trail, no automation
Plateaus fast; nothing runs while owner sleeps

competitors.name: DIY: Microsoft 365 Copilot
competitors.target_market: SG SMEs on Microsoft 365 paying for Copilot add-on as their 'AI strategy' — no workflow automation layer
competitors.sg_pricing_range_published: US$30/user/mo Copilot add-on (≈ S$41/user/mo) on top of M365 Business Standard
competitors.primary_value_prop: AI in the tools people already use — Word/Outlook/Excel/Teams
strengths: Zero change management — lives in existing apps
weaknesses: Not a workflow engine — won't run a lead-gen or support loop on its own
US$30/user/seat adds up fast for 10-person teams (S$410/mo)
Not PSG-eligible standalone
